document: Personal Data Protection (Prescribed Law Enforceme (Singapore - Row 26)

sections.heading: This Notification is the Personal Data Protection (Prescribed Law Enforcement
sections.title: Notification effective date and scope
sections.summary: This section establishes the effective date and scope of the Personal Data Protection (Prescribed Law Enforcement Agency) Notification 2020, which comes into operation on 15 April 2020. It defines the Notification as the official document for prescribed law enforcement agencies under the Personal Data Protection Act. The Notification serves as the legal framework for identifying which agencies qualify as prescribed law enforcement agencies.

requirements.text: This Notification is the Personal Data Protection (Prescribed Law Enforcement Agency) Notification 2020
This Notification comes into operation on 15 April 2020

sections.source_quote: This Notification is the Personal Data Protection (Prescribed Law Enforcement Agency) Notification 2020 and comes into operation on 15 April 2020.

sections.heading: For the purposes of sections 21(4) and 26D(6) of, and the Second Schedule to, the
sections.title: Corrupt Practices Investigation Bureau as prescribed law enforcement agency
sections.summary: This section specifies that the Corrupt Practices Investigation Bureau (CPIB) is designated as a prescribed law enforcement agency under the Personal Data Protection Act. The designation applies to sections 21(4) and 26D(6) of the Act and the Second Schedule. This designation is effective from 5 February 2021, as noted in the reference [S 83/2021].

requirements.text: The Corrupt Practices Investigation Bureau is a prescribed law enforcement agency

sections.source_quote: For the purposes of sections 21(4) and 26D(6) of, and the Second Schedule to, the Act, the Corrupt Practices Investigation Bureau is a prescribed law enforcement agency.
